name: Summoning arms a spellbook and spends gold
description: Clicking SUMMON adds a Lv1 book (auto-equipped) and reduces gold below its starting value. Exact arithmetic is covered by engine unit tests; idle combat income makes precise deltas racy in E2E.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Note the starting GOLD value (about 100) and the cost shown on the SUMMON button
Verify a book with a Lv1 badge appeared in the first equip slot (summons auto-equip) or in the inventory grid

Verify, reading GOLD within a second or two of the click, that it is now lower than the starting value (a purchase happened; small combat income may partially offset it, but it must not be higher than start minus half the cost)
